name: Quill
backstory: An archivist who hoarded the only true records of who did what during the great collapse. He trades fragments for water but never the whole account, certain that the knowledge is worth more kept than spent. Reserved, acquisitive, indifferent to people.

core_values: Survive long enough to remember it all
moral_boundaries: I will not destroy a record — not even an enemy's
soul.personality: Reserved, acquisitive about information, coolly indifferent to people.
goals: Outlive everyone and keep the only true account of what happened
